description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pyudev CI that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and manually from the Actions tab. The workflow consists of two jobs: python-checks and development_environment_checks. The python-checks job uses a matrix strategy to test with different Python versions (3.9.6, 3.6.8, and pypy3) and runs tests using make. The development_environment_checks job uses a matrix strategy to test with different dependencies and tasks (fmt-travis, yamllint, package, and lint) in a Fedora 35 container.
